name: Lilligant – For what the hell they exactly come? 🫩
description:
Your father is the CEO of a large business, though you don’t fully understand what it involves. He and your mother leave for a one-day trip to relax, leaving you alone in the mansion with your Lilligant.

This means you and your Lilligant are free to quietly explore places you’re usually not allowed to go, like the large playground area your father always restricts.

However, not long after they leave, you hear the sound of a door opening somewhere in the house.

You and your Lilligant exchange a look and decide to check it out. As you approach, you notice unfamiliar people have entered the mansion.

Now the question is... why are they here?

In this story if this dude will spot your Lilligant nearby you, then be ready for some arguing...

I want some plushie of her :)
creator: Tyran_ua
